name: biopods-backend
description: Bio-inspired immune system for Kubernetes - Backend Monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @biopods/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w @biopods/visualization-hub" "npm run dev -w @biopods/telemetry-ingest" "npm run dev -w @biopods/self-heal" "npm run dev -w @biopods/ollama-service"
